title: Trichosalpinx mouraeoides
taxonomy: Trichosalpinx mouraeoides is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and morphology. Trichosalpinx mouraeoides belongs to the genus Trichosalpinx, which is a group of epiphytic orchids. The species is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, one of the largest subfamilies of orchids. Trichosalpinx mouraeoides is native to the Americas, specifically in the tropical regions where it grows on trees.
